features: „ÄêSoft & Fluffy Cover„ÄëThe BOLEi furry hot water bottle with soft faux rabbit fur provides warmth for cold hands and feet. There are two openings on the top and bottom to guide your hands
„ÄêLeakproof„Äë Our hot water bottle with cover is made of anti-aging natural rubber, which has leakproof performance and has a longer service life than traditional rubber hot eater bottle
„ÄêKeep Warm Long„ÄëThe 2 liter hot water bottle features a luxurious fluffy lid, large capacity and a thick outer lid that allows it to release heat for an long time

„ÄêEasy to use„ÄëHot water bottle is suitable for neck, shoulders, back, abdomen and other parts of the body. Hot water bottle is suitable as a birthday gift, Christmas gift, Father's Day gift, Mother's Day gift, Thanksgiving gift for mom, dad, grandparents, partner, friends, colleagues, etc., to convey warm care
„ÄêMultifunction„ÄëWhether on the bed, on the sofa or on the table, the faux fur hot water bottle is very practical, especially in winter, you can spend a warm night with a fluffy hot water bottle
description: Product Description Hot water bottles are essential for staying warm in winter, allowing you to share cozy moments with family and friends. Available in a variety of stylish colors, they're suitable for both men and women. They're perfect as birthday gifts, Christmas gifts, Thanksgiving gifts, and other gifts for moms, dads, grandparents, relatives, friends, partners, and colleagues, conveying warmth and care. 2.5cm water inlet Humanized increase the water intake to avoid the danger caused by the hot water bottle with cover splashing. Premium sealing plug Can effectively prevent the ageing and leakage of the hot water bottle mouth and extend the life of the hot water bottle. Keep warm for a long time BOLEi large hot water bottle keeps it warm longer than others. The physical conduction conducts the heat evenly and offers you a new pleasant experience. Material with a thickness of 3mm Feel a softer touch, longer lasting warmth and a slower release of warmth. Tips: To reduce the odor caused by moisture in the rubber lining during the rainy season, please follow the steps below for cleaning and maintenance. 1. After use, clean the liner with a mild detergent. 2. Place in a ventilated place to dry (avoid direct sunlight), and store in a cool place after it is completely dry. 3. Take it out and dry it once a month during the rainy season to avoid moisture.
